name: Inversion
description: Solve by identifying what causes failure and avoiding those paths first.
flavor: Turn the map upside down and traps reveal themselves.

name: Second-Order Thinking
description: Evaluate choices by considering downstream consequences beyond immediate results.
flavor: See the second wave before the first one breaks.

name: Five Whys
description: Ask why repeatedly to trace symptoms back to the root cause.
flavor: Each why peels another layer from the hidden core.

name: Kaizen
description: Pursue steady, incremental improvements to processes and outcomes.
flavor: Small daily gains forge legendary mastery.

name: Swipe File
description: Collect and organize strong examples to inspire faster, better execution.
flavor: A vault of past brilliance fuels your next spell.

name: First Principles
description: Break assumptions down to fundamentals and rebuild from basic truths.
flavor: From bedrock truths, new worlds are crafted.

name: Pareto Principle
description: Focus on the vital few inputs that generate most of the results.
flavor: Strike the critical twenty and claim the eighty.

name: OODA Loop
description: Cycle quickly through observe, orient, decide, and act to adapt faster.
flavor: Move before chaos can name your position.

name: Jobs to Be Done
description: Design solutions around the real progress users are trying to make.
flavor: Hear the quest behind the request.

name: Pre-Mortem
description: Imagine a future failure and work backward to prevent it now.
flavor: Foresee the ruin, and the ruin loses power.
